title: Claude Fable 5 sets a fluid simulation to Beethoven
summary: Claude Fable 5 generated both a fluid simulation and an EDM remix of Beethoven using code alone, then synchronized the visual simulation to the musical beat. This showcases the model's ability to produce coordinated outputs across domains without prior exposure to music.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 generating code for a fluid simulation synchronized to an EDM remix of Beethoven. The model also produced the music itself through code, without prior exposure to audio. The demonstration spans fluid simulation, code generation, and video generation, indicating that a single model can output both the audiovisual rendering and the accompanying audio from code alone.
